sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108706" key="u(po/limnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόλιμνος</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f. l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope></bibl>, where <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπόλημνον</foreign> codd. AG; the correction of G<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀτύπωτος ὕλη μόνον ἦν</foreign> should be accepted.</entryFree>
